_license: Public OECD National Contact Points specific instances (OECD Watch + OECD MNE Guidelines NCP register). Each row cites a per-case source URL. CC-BY-style use; cite originals.

environment.narrative: 2 OECD NCP specific instances (1 closed without agreement, 1 ongoing); most recent 2023 (Netherlands NCP). Netherlands NCP follow-up on Shell's Ogoniland clean-up obligations; OECD Watch reports progress as incomplete as of 2023.

cases.caseTitle: Shell — Niger Delta human rights / environment (Friends of the Earth Netherlands)
cases.summary: Netherlands NCP final statement found Shell's Nigeria operations breached the OECD Guidelines on environmental and disclosure provisions tied to Niger Delta oil spills. No agreement reached.

cases.caseTitle: Shell — Ogoniland clean-up follow-up
cases.summary: Netherlands NCP follow-up on Shell's Ogoniland clean-up obligations; OECD Watch reports progress as incomplete as of 2023.

environment.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (France NCP, 2024): ongoing. French NCP accepted the specific instance against TotalEnergies on the East African Crude Oil Pipeline / Tilenga project; instance remains under follow-up monitoring as of 2024.

cases.caseTitle: TotalEnergies — EACOP / Tilenga pipeline (Survie + Les Amis de la Terre)
cases.summary: French NCP accepted the specific instance against TotalEnergies on the East African Crude Oil Pipeline / Tilenga project; instance remains under follow-up monitoring as of 2024.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (UK NCP, 2004): agreement reached. UK NCP closed with a final statement after BP committed to engagement protocols for the Tangguh LNG project in West Papua. Agreement reached.

cases.caseTitle: BP — West Papua LNG (WALHI)
cases.summary: UK NCP closed with a final statement after BP committed to engagement protocols for the Tangguh LNG project in West Papua. Agreement reached.

political.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Norway NCP, 2015): closed without agreement. Norwegian NCP final statement found Statoil/Equinor's non-publication of the Tanzanian production-sharing agreement fell short of OECD disclosure expectations.

cases.caseTitle: Equinor (Statoil) — Tanzanian gas contract transparency
cases.summary: Norwegian NCP final statement found Statoil/Equinor's non-publication of the Tanzanian production-sharing agreement fell short of OECD disclosure expectations.

labor.narrative: 2 OECD NCP specific instances (2 closed without agreement); most recent 2020 (Switzerland NCP). Swiss NCP accepted complaint against Glencore for community impacts of the Cerrejón coal mine; final statement closed without agreement on remedy.

cases.caseTitle: Glencore — Cerrejón coal mine, Colombia (Forced displacement of Wayúu and Afro-Colombian communities)
cases.summary: Swiss NCP accepted complaint against Glencore for community impacts of the Cerrejón coal mine; final statement closed without agreement on remedy.

cases.caseTitle: Glencore — DRC Kamoto copper operations (labour rights)
cases.summary: Swiss NCP closing statement on Glencore's DRC Kamoto operations identified gaps in trade-union engagement protocols.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Australia NCP, 2020): closed without agreement. Australian NCP parallel complaint over Cerrejón (BHP was a Cerrejón co-owner). Final statement noted insufficient community engagement.

cases.caseTitle: BHP Billiton — Cerrejón coal mine (community resettlement)
cases.summary: Australian NCP parallel complaint over Cerrejón (BHP was a Cerrejón co-owner). Final statement noted insufficient community engagement.

environment.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Brazil NCP, 2017): withdrawn. Brazilian NCP instance over the 2015 Samarco/Mariana tailings dam disaster (Vale–BHP JV) withdrawn after parallel domestic litigation; case noted as landmark for tailings risk.

cases.caseTitle: Vale — Mariana / Samarco tailings dam collapse (BHP-Vale JV)
cases.summary: Brazilian NCP instance over the 2015 Samarco/Mariana tailings dam disaster (Vale–BHP JV) withdrawn after parallel domestic litigation; case noted as landmark for tailings risk.

environment.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Australia NCP, 2022): agreement reached. Australian NCP brokered Rio Tinto's commitment to fund an independent environmental and human rights impact assessment of the legacy Panguna mine site.

cases.caseTitle: Rio Tinto — Bougainville / Panguna mine legacy
cases.summary: Australian NCP brokered Rio Tinto's commitment to fund an independent environmental and human rights impact assessment of the legacy Panguna mine site.

environment.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (US NCP, 2014): closed without agreement. US NCP closed the specific instance over Newmont's Conga / Yanacocha operations without agreement; no formal finding of breach.

cases.caseTitle: Newmont — Yanacocha mine, Peru (Conga project environmental harm)
cases.summary: US NCP closed the specific instance over Newmont's Conga / Yanacocha operations without agreement; no formal finding of breach.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (US NCP, 2014): rejected. US NCP declined to accept the Grasberg specific instance; OECD Watch criticised the rejection in its 2015 annual report.

cases.caseTitle: Freeport — Grasberg mine, Indonesia (security forces / human rights)
cases.summary: US NCP declined to accept the Grasberg specific instance; OECD Watch criticised the rejection in its 2015 annual report.

environment.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Netherlands NCP, 2019): agreement reached. Landmark Netherlands NCP statement: agreement that ING would set climate goals consistent with Paris targets — first NCP case to link bank lending and climate.

cases.caseTitle: ING — climate-policy adequacy (Friends of the Earth NL et al.)
cases.summary: Landmark Netherlands NCP statement: agreement that ING would set climate goals consistent with Paris targets — first NCP case to link bank lending and climate.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Switzerland NCP, 2019): closed without agreement. Swiss NCP accepted complaint over Credit Suisse financing of the Dakota Access Pipeline; closing statement reported continued disagreement on due diligence adequacy.

cases.caseTitle: Credit Suisse — DAPL / Energy Transfer Partners financing
cases.summary: Swiss NCP accepted complaint over Credit Suisse financing of the Dakota Access Pipeline; closing statement reported continued disagreement on due diligence adequacy.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (UK NCP, 2024): ongoing. UK NCP accepted complaints alleging Apple's cobalt sourcing from DRC artisanal mines fell short of OECD due-diligence standards; case under follow-up.

cases.caseTitle: Apple — DRC cobalt supply chain (RAID, IPIS)
cases.summary: UK NCP accepted complaints alleging Apple's cobalt sourcing from DRC artisanal mines fell short of OECD due-diligence standards; case under follow-up.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (US NCP, 2024): ongoing. US NCP accepted parallel complaint on cobalt due diligence; specific instance ongoing.

cases.caseTitle: Tesla — DRC cobalt supply chain (RAID, IPIS)
cases.summary: US NCP accepted parallel complaint on cobalt due diligence; specific instance ongoing.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (South Korea NCP, 2019): closed without agreement. Korean NCP final statement: Samsung disputed worker-health allegations at Vietnam plants; no remedial agreement reached.

cases.caseTitle: Samsung — Vietnam factory worker conditions (IPEN)
cases.summary: Korean NCP final statement: Samsung disputed worker-health allegations at Vietnam plants; no remedial agreement reached.

political.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (UK NCP, 2022): rejected. UK NCP declined to accept the Xinjiang surveillance specific instance citing inadequate connection to UK operations.

cases.caseTitle: Huawei — Uyghur surveillance / Xinjiang sourcing (Global Legal Action Network)
cases.summary: UK NCP declined to accept the Xinjiang surveillance specific instance citing inadequate connection to UK operations.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Germany NCP, 2013): agreement reached. German NCP brokered Adidas commitment to humanitarian-aid payments to ex-PT Kizone workers following factory closure.

cases.caseTitle: Adidas — PT Kizone Indonesia severance (Workers Rights Consortium)
cases.summary: German NCP brokered Adidas commitment to humanitarian-aid payments to ex-PT Kizone workers following factory closure.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Sweden NCP, 2015): agreement reached. Swedish NCP closing statement: H&M committed to enhanced supplier-fire-safety auditing aligned with the Accord on Fire and Building Safety in Bangladesh.

cases.caseTitle: H&M — Bangladesh supplier fire safety (post-Rana Plaza monitoring)
cases.summary: Swedish NCP closing statement: H&M committed to enhanced supplier-fire-safety auditing aligned with the Accord on Fire and Building Safety in Bangladesh.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (US NCP, 2018): closed without agreement. US NCP closed Nike-Hansae instance without agreement; OECD Watch report flagged the NCP process as opaque.

cases.caseTitle: Nike — Hansae Vietnam factory dispute
cases.summary: US NCP closed Nike-Hansae instance without agreement; OECD Watch report flagged the NCP process as opaque.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Spain NCP, 2024): ongoing. Spanish NCP accepted complaint alleging Inditex's Myanmar suppliers underpaid garment workers; instance under follow-up.

cases.caseTitle: Inditex — Myanmar supplier wage theft
cases.summary: Spanish NCP accepted complaint alleging Inditex's Myanmar suppliers underpaid garment workers; instance under follow-up.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Switzerland NCP, 2021): agreement reached. Swiss NCP closing statement: Nestlé agreed to publish supplier-tier disclosure of its cocoa supply chain and strengthen child-labour remediation.

cases.caseTitle: Nestlé — Côte d'Ivoire cocoa child labour (Mighty Earth)
cases.summary: Swiss NCP closing statement: Nestlé agreed to publish supplier-tier disclosure of its cocoa supply chain and strengthen child-labour remediation.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (UK NCP, 2022): agreement reached. UK NCP closing statement: Unilever committed to enhanced grievance mechanisms after post-election violence at Kericho tea estate (Kenya).

cases.caseTitle: Unilever — Kericho tea-estate violence (Kenya)
cases.summary: UK NCP closing statement: Unilever committed to enhanced grievance mechanisms after post-election violence at Kericho tea estate (Kenya).

environment.narrative: 2 OECD NCP specific instances (2 ongoing); most recent 2024 (Brazil NCP). Brazilian NCP accepted multiple specific instances against JBS over Amazon-deforestation links in its cattle supply chain. Ongoing.

cases.caseTitle: JBS — Brazilian beef supply-chain deforestation
cases.summary: Brazilian NCP accepted multiple specific instances against JBS over Amazon-deforestation links in its cattle supply chain. Ongoing.

cases.caseTitle: JBS — Brazilian Amazon meatpacker due diligence (US NCP)
cases.summary: US NCP accepted specific instance over JBS USA's sourcing exposure to Brazilian Amazon deforestation. Ongoing follow-up.

environment.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (US NCP, 2020): closed without agreement. US NCP closed instance against Cargill's Brazilian soy sourcing without agreement; final statement noted Cargill resisted full transparency on Cerrado suppliers.

cases.caseTitle: Cargill — Brazilian soy / Cerrado deforestation (Mighty Earth)
cases.summary: US NCP closed instance against Cargill's Brazilian soy sourcing without agreement; final statement noted Cargill resisted full transparency on Cerrado suppliers.

environment.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Netherlands NCP, 2021): closed without agreement. Netherlands NCP final statement criticised Bunge for limited adoption of zero-deforestation commitments in the Cerrado biome.

cases.caseTitle: Bunge — Cerrado soy / deforestation
cases.summary: Netherlands NCP final statement criticised Bunge for limited adoption of zero-deforestation commitments in the Cerrado biome.

political.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Switzerland NCP, 2015): rejected. Swiss NCP declined the specific instance, citing patent law as outside Guidelines scope. OECD Watch flagged in annual report.

cases.caseTitle: Novartis — India / South Africa access-to-medicines (Treatment Action Campaign)
cases.summary: Swiss NCP declined the specific instance, citing patent law as outside Guidelines scope. OECD Watch flagged in annual report.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Norway NCP, 2013): closed without agreement. Norwegian NCP final statement: Norges Bank Investment Management's POSCO holding lacked adequate due diligence for the disputed Odisha project.

cases.caseTitle: POSCO — Odisha (India) steel project displacement
cases.summary: Norwegian NCP final statement: Norges Bank Investment Management's POSCO holding lacked adequate due diligence for the disputed Odisha project.

labor.narrative: OECD NCP specific instance (Netherlands NCP, 2017): agreement reached. Netherlands NCP brokered settlement: Heineken paid compensation to DRC Bralima workers dismissed during the 1999 occupation period.

cases.caseTitle: Heineken — DRC Bralima workers (post-war redundancy)
cases.summary: Netherlands NCP brokered settlement: Heineken paid compensation to DRC Bralima workers dismissed during the 1999 occupation period.
